hero.subtitle: SAKI TRAILER 29 SARL is the only representative of Lecitrailer in Morocco, supplying trailers, semi-trailers, reefers, curtainsiders, rigids, and other Lecitrailer vehicles across the country, while also selling used vehicles and supporting transport operations.

categoriesSection.title: Browse Lecitrailer products and used transport stock by vehicle type

services.subtitle: Services
services.title: Vehicles, transport, and operational support
services.supportDesc: Direct support from the only Lecitrailer representative in Morocco for product selection, quotations, and delivery planning.
services.bestPricesDesc: Selected used vehicles and related transport equipment ready for operators and fleet buyers.
services.deliveryDesc: We assist with sourcing, delivery coordination, and related services for transport activity in Morocco and beyond.

newVehicles.title: New Lecitrailer vehicles
newVehicles.subtitle: Official Lecitrailer supply in Morocco
newVehicles.description: Explore new Lecitrailer trailers, semi-trailers, reefers, curtainsiders, rigids, container chassis, and tailor-made transport solutions for Moroccan fleets.

usedVehicles.subtitle: Selected stock for immediate operation

afterSales.title: Transport services
afterSales.subtitle: Support around international transport
afterSales.description: Beyond vehicle sales, SAKI TRAILER 29 SARL also supports transport activity with coordination and related services linked to international transport operations.

testimonials.subtitle: Customer feedback
testimonials.title: What buyers say
testimonials.description: Reviews from transport and logistics customers who bought vehicles through SakiTrailer29.

items.name: Ahmed Benali
items.text: Excellent service. I bought an Iveco truck and the process was clear, fast, and professional from start to delivery.

items.name: Fatima Zahra
items.text: Very smooth buying experience. The vehicle matched the listing and the team stayed available during every step.

items.name: Mohamed El Amrani
items.text: Strong customer support, competitive pricing, and good after-sales follow-up. I would buy again.

items.name: Youssef Idrissi
items.text: The team helped me find the right vehicle for my transport company without wasting time on unsuitable options.

items.name: Khadija Oufkir
items.text: My first utility vehicle purchase and the process felt straightforward. The explanations were clear and practical.

items.name: Omar Bennani
items.text: SakiTrailer29 has become a reliable source for professional vehicles. Good service, fair pricing, and fast communication.
